title: We Cut 94% of AI Coding Tokens With a Local Code Index - Rajkumar Sakthivel, Tesco
summary: Rajkumar Sakthivel describes a local code indexing approach that reduces token usage by 94% in AI coding agents. The system uses AST-aware chunking, combined vector and keyword search, and lightweight relationship tracking to send only relevant context instead of entire files. The technique achieves faster responses, lower latency, and improved accuracy while keeping all data local.
writeup: Rajkumar Sakthivel of Tesco presents a local code indexing system that cuts token usage in AI coding agents by 94%. The method combines AST-aware chunking, vector search paired with keyword matching, and lightweight relationship tracking to send only relevant context rather than whole files. The reported results include faster responses, lower latency, and improved accuracy, with all data kept local.
